name: Stovetop Beans and Franfurter
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large skillet, sauté the frankfurters and onion in margarine until the frankfurters are lightly browned.
2. Add the pork and beans along with the remaining ingredients to the skillet.
3. Stir gently and cook over medium heat for 10 minutes or until heated through, stirring often.
Yield: 6 servings
